activities_projects.title: Observing Shadows
steps: Place the opaque object between torch and wall
Observe the shadow formed
Move the object closer/farther and observe change
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how shadows are formed and factors affecting size
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct observation of shadow formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Shadow Length Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Study how shadow length changes with light position
steps: Stand the stick vertically on a table
Shine torch at different angles
Measure shadow length each time
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands effect of light angle on shadow length

activities_projects.title: Exploring Transparent, Translucent, and Opaque Objects
activities_projects.objective: Classify objects based on light passage
steps: Shine torch through each object
Observe if light passes fully, partially, or not at all
Classify objects accordingly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies types of materials based on light transmission

activities_projects.title: Making a Periscope
steps: Cut two holes on opposite sides of the box
Fix mirrors at 45° angles inside the box
Look through one hole to see objects on the other side
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns light reflection and its applications

activities_projects.title: Observing Reflection in Plane Mirrors
activities_projects.objective: Study reflection of light from a plane mirror
steps: Shine torch on mirror
Observe reflected light on wall
Change angle of incidence and observe reflected angle
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct observation of incident and reflected angles (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Making a Shadow Puppet
steps: Place cutouts in front of torch to form shapes on wall
Move cutouts closer or farther to change shadow size
Experiment with different shapes and designs
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and correct shadow formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparing Shadow in Bright Sunlight vs Torch
activities_projects.objective: Observe effect of light intensity on shadow
steps: Observe shadow of object in sunlight
Observe shadow under torch light indoors
Compare darkness and sharpness of shadows
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands effect of light source on shadow quality

activities_projects.title: Experiment with Multiple Light Sources
steps: Place object in front of wall
Shine two torches from different angles
Observe number and position of shadows formed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that multiple light sources create multiple shadows
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct observation of shadow patterns (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Exploring Concave and Convex Mirrors
steps: Shine torch light on concave mirror, observe reflected light
Repeat with convex mirror
Compare how light converges or diverges
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands difference between concave and convex mirror reflection

activities_projects.title: Quiz on Shadows and Reflection
steps: Prepare five questions on shadows
Prepare five questions on reflections and mirrors
Exchange with a friend and solve
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Strengthens understanding of light, shadows, and reflections
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and answers (10 marks)
